title: Groov-e Air Duster Can - Compressed Air Cleaner for PC, Canned Air Spray, Can Dust Cleaner for Keyboards and Electronics - Extension Straw, 400ml
features: AIR DUSTER - A cleaning powerhouse for keeping all your electronic devices clean, extending their lifespan; the Groov-e Air Duster is a 400ml can of compressed air that will blast away all the dust and debris that hides in between your electronics

AIR CLEANER FOR ELECTRONICS - This air duster is odourless and safe to use for cleaning camera lenses, tablets, keyboards, PC components, printers, laptops, gaming consoles and more; while extremely safe to use, do not inhale compressed air
EXTENSION STRAW - Includes an extension straw that attaches to the nozzle for more precise and controlled cleaning and to make it easier to blow air in harder-to-reach spaces and cracks

EASY TO USE - The Groov-e Air Duster is extremely simple to use, just aim the nozzle where you want to clean and press to watch high-pressure air blow away all the dirt and dust. Attach the extension tube for more precise cleaning
BOX CONTENTS - Every package comes with 1x 400ml Groov-e Air Duster Can and 1x Precision Extension Tube
description: From the manufacturer Camera Lenses A controlled stream of compressed air, ensure your lenses stay clear and pristine, preserving the quality of your photographs. Components Tailored for components offer a safe and efficient method to clean sensitive electronic devices like computer internals and circuitry. Tablets With a precise burst of compressed air, they provide a convenient solution for maintaining your tablet's cleanliness without risking damage from liquid cleaners or abrasive materials. Keyboards Provide a convenient solution for removing dust and debris from hard-to-reach crevices, ensuring optimal performance and longevity of your keyboard.
